response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with broad polyglot experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems in a cloud compute platform context. The resume shows only ~6 months of C/C++ work a decade ago and no demonstrated cloud compute platform leadership, making this a poor match against the hard minimum qualifications.
strengths: Long track record of senior/staff engineering roles with mentoring, workshops, and technical leadership signals
Distributed/high-throughput experience at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests/sec, low-latency services)
Strong software craftsmanship discipline — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling
concerns: Does not meet the 8 years C++ requirement — only ~6 months of C/C++ at National Instruments in 2014-2015
No demonstrated experience leading or architecting an internal cloud compute platform
Primary stack (TypeScript/Node/DLang) does not align with the C++ systems focus of the role

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale infra leadership
Senior-level engineering tenure and mentoring track record
